review_text: This might not be a 5 star caravan park but the service and assistance provided by Karla is 10/10.  Any problems we had,  we spoke to Karla who was so good at meeting our requests.  Right in the middle of Mount Gambier I would recommend this park to anyone.
Lovely staff and clean amenities. Grass needed a mow as was very long l.
Clean and tidy older style cabin with a very comfortable bed
Great little quiet park right in the middle of town, close to everything
Close to shops and quiet

Travelling Aussies 🇦🇺

We stayed two nights in this well located caravan park and enjoyed every minute

The office staff are friendly & helpful and the park facilities are well maintained

We chose this particular park for its proximity to super markets, cafes, restaurants and the town centre - all in easy walking distance

It’s not a Big4 and is better suited to couples travelling in small to medium rigs or looking for cabin accommodation

We had everything we needed and would happily stay again

Highly recommended ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We stayed at Mount Gambier Central Caravan Park and overall found it to be clean, tidy, and well maintained.

There are two sites located opposite each other just off the main road, with the office situated in between them. The site isn’t gated or barricaded. We were advised that arrival needs to be by 5pm; otherwise, check-in information is left outside the office. This differs from some other parks that provide site details earlier on the day of arrival.

We booked a powered site, however it ended up being of no use to us as we didn’t have a power cable, and unfortunately the office did not have any spare cables available.

The laundrette is conveniently located next to the office and operates on coins only — washing costs $4 per load and the dryer is $1 for 7 minutes.

The cabins and caravan sites are nestled compactly between each other. The camp kitchen is very well equipped, with a BBQ, kettle, toaster, utensils, oven, microwave, washing-up liquid, scourer, and cloth provided.

The bathrooms are clean and include towel hooks and a good shower.

One small suggestion would be to provide vinegar or baking paper for the BBQ to make cleaning easier for guests.
Overall, a pleasant and comfortable stay.
A nice little park, friendly happy staff, the facilities are a bit old but absolutely spotless, good value for money.
Cabins were poorly cleaned and staff were quite rude when challenged.
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay here.
Cabins haven't been updated in 400 years

+ Friendly staff
+ Affordable
+ Short walk for quality takeaway food and supermarkets
+ Good laundromat

- Older facilities but reasonably well maintained
- More suitable for adults
- Fire station nearby, frequent sirens
2nd night ... good personal facilities. Clean & well serviced.
Booked last minute and they accommodated us which we were very thankful for. It was a great stay and we had electricity. It was very quiet, everything was super clean. They have toilets and showers.

Would be 3.5-4 rating - location is good for shops and places to eat & drink. Being on the main road and camped with a laneway behind us there were few incidents that made it feel unsafe.
Other than that the park was clean, amenities were well maintained, camp kitchen was well equipped (no need for any of your own stuff) staff we're very friendly and we're actively about checking on things throughout the day.
They looked after us well

Staff great, and helpful.
Walking distance to town is awesome.
Good stay over
Die zentrale Lage ist absolut ein Plus! Die Geräusche der anliegenden Straßen haben uns nicht gestört. Der Platz ist älter, war aber top gepflegt.

We stayed in a Deluxe Queen unit at this park; there was nothing Deluxe about it!

Bad Points:
The unit was in serious need of an upgrade & general maintenance, very dated.   Two lights were flickering all the time (the kitchen light and the fridge light).   Two of the water tap handles constantly fell of off.
The extractor fan had no light at all.  The smoke detector is mounted directly above the cooking top causing it to go-off frequently while cooking or just making toast.  The fly screen door would not close properly

The internet was useless; it was so slow we could not use it – we had to hot-spot our phones and run the PC over our phones!!.

Our unit was directly opposite the toilet and kitchen block (for the campers) so there were campers using it and talking most of the time.

During our trip around SA & Vic this was by far the worst accommodation we experienced.

Good points:
The place was clean & the bed comfortable.
We could park right in front of the unit.
We only booked for one night!!

This is an old dated very affordable caravan Park if you are not looking for fancy playgrounds. It's s a good place to park your caravan and walk to the town. It's close to everything. Amenities were very clean
Don't go there

Nice little old style van park.. very helpful staff.
Without all the bells and whistles... Just comfortable.

There is 2 sides choose the side opposite the office. The part on office side is old small and the road with the turning room is small if over 18foot van. The actual sites are large. The dog next door nipped me.

위치는 최고 걸어서 마트도 갈 수 있고 싱크홀 구경도 갈 수 있음.
전체적으로 깔끔하지만 주방 오븐은 요리하기에 적합하지 않음.

Two sections to this park the old and the newer. Based on the tariff it rates highly but the biggest attraction is its central location within easy walking to entertainment, shops and restaurants.
Photo of the neighbours
Clean and emaculate terrific place for a family holiday .or friends .highk

If we were to review the park on their toilet paper it would be 11 out of 10. The best loo paper we have ever come across in a caravan park. Thank You. The staff are lovely and the park is well situated, great camp kitchen and steaming hot water in the showers

I booked thru booking.com and due to the lack of specification, I was under the impression all rooms were pet friendly. It wasn't until after I booked that I was told there was only availability for one night. I was told a cancellation would be made but there has been no mention of a refund. I am hoping to revieve a full refund so that I can book somewhere else and rebook here in the next school holidays for one night on the way to Melbourne.

A very centrally located park with an easy stroll to cafes, take away and supermarkets. Park is divided by a town road, where the part we stayed in had very large sites, but was very old and lots of perms. Dump point across the road. Personally, I didn’t feel safe - we had a self titled homeless girl ask for a towel to shower (which she was given), people screaming at each other on the other side of the fence, and sirens for most of the stay. Amenities clean and park is centrally located, but not one we would go back to.
Very clean small park, close to shops etc
An older park but well kept. So central to shops etc. Great place to stay.

It was ok. Very tight. Not a lot of space. There was a screw up with our site which we didn't find out till it was dark and the office was closed. Someone else had the same site. Awkward. Fortunately there was a spare site in front of us and they moved there... The facilities are older but everything was clean and worked well. Easy walk to shops and eating places so super handy. The can next to us was discharging grey water into the ground following the camp instructions. Didn't really like that as now you had to walk around the grey water puddle. Yuk. Fortunately we were in a roof top tent.....
Close to town so easy walking around
Very helpful and informative staff, close to restaurants

Outstanding Service – Even for Non-Guests!

Whilst travelling through the Mount Gambier area, we had a part break on our caravan and found ourselves in a bit of a bind over the Easter break. We called the Mount Gambier Central Caravan Park looking for some help, and that’s when we had the pleasure of speaking with Joy.

Even though we weren’t staying at the park, Joy was more than happy to assist. She provided us with local contacts for parts and service and, incredibly, went the extra mile by offering to loan us a part until the stores reopened after the holidays. That kind of genuine kindness and above-and-beyond service is rare these days.

If this is the level of care and support they offer to someone who isn’t even staying at the park, I can only imagine how well they look after their actual guests! We’ll definitely be booking a stay at Mount Gambier Central Caravan Park the next time we’re in the area.

Thanks again, Joy – you turned a stressful situation into a great reminder of the kindness that still exists in the world.
Midden in de stad beetje gedateerde douches en toiletten. Maar .... enorm schoon. Top als je even stads wil staan

I cannot fault the caravan park.. it's small.. cosy but is enough for a holiday.. the caretakers were amazing as we had to suddenly leave for Victoria but left van in storage .. the showers / toilets  very clean .... great park if don't hv to entertain kids.(no plaground). and very close to main street and all shops needed to walk to....🙂🙂

This is a great, no-nonsense caravan park. The owner and staff are friendly and helpful.
We stayed in a cabin for 2 nights. It is very reasonable, priced, and clean.
Have stayed here a number of times now and will stay here again next time I'm in Mt Gambier.

Great small well maintained park in a very central area of Mt Gambier
Grassed sites all close to amenities
Certainly would stay again
Friendly staff and dog friendly. The area didnt feel overly safe. Random walking around the park and police in the park dealing with permanents.

We stayed three nights camping here. In the heart of the town, very nice and well maintained shared amenities/toilets/showers. There is a lot wind and rain during our stay and our tent somehow survived 😀. Many mentioned that camping with tent in Mount Gambier is not a wise decision.
Nice little caravan park, walking distance from array of shops and eating facilities

The price was very fair and the people running the place were amazing. Let us refund a site that we paid for but didn’t have enough people to use, I took a key home on accident 5h drive away and they were so sweet about it and I’ve mailed it back. Would 100% stay there again and again.
amazing location, great facility's, friendly staff and cheap for the family. great caravan park.
It may be small but it is a very tidy caravan park and very Central to the shops the club right in the heart of my Gambier you won't be sorry .

Stayed in a deluxe cabin and everything was nice and clean. Disappointed in the hot water though. Did have a comment on the wall saying the system doesn't cope with long showers and needed 20 minutes in between showers to reheat, but was not hot to start with.
It was not bad for small family operation

We are a couple with a self contained caravan. This van park ticked all our boxes. Being within the towns CBD was certainly an advantage. The only slight negative would be it seemed to be close to an ambulance depot as we heard the sirens at night but this was no biggie for us. Certainly would return.
Great place, quiet and so close to the center of town

Unpowered site for $28. Cheap,good location,but too crowded .
The kitchen is not big but good enough. The shower room is clean.
Notice 1：the Wi-Fi password is for one device, if you have iPad or laptop need to connect,you need to get extra password.

Notice 2 : The fridge is locked, so need to ask for the password.

My wife and I stayed at this caravan park for about 12 weeks. Got to no the staff and the manager quite well This park Is not your high end of parks but it has everything you need. Clean showers and toilets. Walking distance to take away shops service stations, All the big brand supermarkets all with in walking distance the park. is clean and tidy. I would recommend this park to anybody.
Very nice close to everything
Great central location

Place of last resort. Very basic and like someones back yard.

Try blue lake resort. Inspect before you book. We were told that it was booked out and placed near the shed (just like other reviews have warned about) ask for a flat even location which they reluctantly moved us to.

Turned out from so many empty spots next morning they were only about 1/3 booked.
Older park but good and central.  Shopping round the corner
Great location close to town. Clean amenities.
A small quaint caravan park smack in the middle of Mouth Gambier. Old but very clean, Great amenities and shaded by trees.Great park within walking distance to main St and shops. 👍
Great value in a busy town
Very clean friendly staff
A great place to stay
Nice pitch, clean facilities.

We were here for a night. The location is right at the center of the city. All amenities are with in walkable distance.
Toilets are very clean and the location is tidy.
So friendly and helpful. We had a late check in and they were incredibly accommodating.
The caravan park is old but facilities are clean.  It is just around the corner from the main street of town so that is a bonus . The manager and  staff are very friendly. I would stay here again.

Joy and staff were so helpful and friendly,  the bathrooms and camp kitchen were so much better and cleaner than I expected.  Walking distance from supermarkets, takeaways and coffee shops. The 24/7 laundromat was a lifesaver and we felt very safe here. Hoping to return soon. Quite affordable too.

Thank you Joy for being such a great host.  We love this park for its location in a quiet street of the Mt Gambier CBD.  There is so much to see in Mt Gambier that we wished we could have stayed longer.  This caravan park has very clean amenities and grassy sites.  We recommend the Heritage walk, the lakes, sinkholes and the Mt Schank rim walk.

I was pleasantly surprised with this caravan park. The amenities are in immaculate, the bathrooms so clean and smell fresh, and it may seem silly, but the toilet paper is a really good quality! There is a great outdoor kitchen for everyone to use and the barbecues in there are shining. We had a powered site on lawn maybe a little bit small as we couldn’t put our annex up on the caravan, but that was the only thing I could fault. I will definitely be staying again.
Very nice and clean, friendly service by joy as we booked last minute stay for the night and we were very happy they had one spot left

Great experience,  happy with the amenities and service.
Thanks for the information about what to see and do when we were in this beautiful city.
I give it three and a half star, very quiet, clean,$7 cheaper than big 4 where close to Coles Woolworths Aldi's and many other shops, few interesting sites like blue like and sync halls.
Nice park, handy location, clean amenities, staff are friendly and helpful
Nice park in middle of town walk to shops
I thought it was fantastic the guide was very knowledgeable and fun

Ok if you want to stay in the centre of town. Close to most things and a bit confusing as there are two parts to this caravan park
On one side of Krummel Street is the park reception and on the other side is the main caravan park. We were directed to go behind the reception to an old area with old amenities, and the lights and exhaust fan in the amenities went out after two minutes upon entering the shower. I was left in the dark. Staff were not friendly and seemed under stress.
Very central to the town. Amenities are good and staff friendly. Not a kids type of park.

One star is too generous.  Booked a cabin, and was given a smelly damp room that had containers of damp rid on the shelves. Peeling paint and no air-con no heating. Disgusting smelly damp hovel. We tried to get a refund, the room was a hazard to my medical condition and was refused. Do not stay here

The park was everything we needed for the night, quiet and clean with amazing help from reception who kindly left us out a map of the town after our unexpected very late arrival. Toilet facilities were impeccable with cleanliness which made the stay feel incredibly comfortable. Thank you!
Such a handy park. Close to shops. Very clean. Not only has shower curtains but they were changed a few times in our less than 2 week stay. And yes lovely hot showers.
Tidy and clean helpful staff
Excellent caravan park
Very tight spaces, large motorhomes are parked in what seems like a backyard. Close to shops, but wouldn't want to stay there long. Pretty rough area.
